head.title: Dispute resolution | Moonstone Advocates
head.description: Resolve commercial and personal disputes with confidence. Our dispute resolution solicitors provide clear advice and practical solutions.
head.ogDescription: Resolve commercial and personal disputes with confidence. Our dispute resolution solicitors provide clear advice and practical solutions.

blocks.html:
Dispute Resolution

When legal challenges arise, you need clear advice and a steady plan. Our Dispute Resolution team help individuals manage and resolve legal disputes of all sizes. Whether you’re bringing a claim or defending court proceedings, we’ll guide you through the process with straightforward, practical advice. Court isn’t always the answer. Wherever possible, we look for efficient ways to resolve disputes through alternative dispute resolution, to save time, reduce costs, and preserve important relationships.

For individuals
Dispute Resolution

Services

Your interests come first. We work with you to agree a clear strategy from the outset, focused on protecting your position and achieving the right outcome. You’ll always know where you stand and what the next step looks like.

Speak to an expert

Banking & Finance Disputes

We help individuals challenge insurers, brokers and advisers to recover losses and secure the compensation they deserve.

Contract Claims

Whether you're dealing with lost income, business disruption, or a claim made against you, we'll help you understand your position and take practical steps to protect your interests.

Defamation, Privacy, Media & Reputation Management

If false or damaging statements are affecting your reputation, we can act swiftly to stop further harm and protect what matters most.

Employment Disputes

Clear, strategic legal support for employees dealing with employment contract disputes, restrictive covenants and allegations of wrongdoing.

Injunctions

In many cases, an injunction can prevent further loss, protect valuable assets, or preserve your position whilst a dispute is being resolved. We have extensive experience securing injunctions.

Judicial Review

If a public body has acted unlawfully or unreasonably, we can help you challenge the decision and protect your rights.

Professional Negligence Claims

If a professional’s mistake has cost you financially, we can help you bring a professional negligence claim and seek redress.

Experts in every area
